semantic_boundary: Assess whether a public-safe context packet is adequate for local manuscript consistency checks.
interface_contract: Accept a context packet handle and emit an adequacy state with residual risks and source-boundary notes.
evaluator_policy: A separate validator checks record shape, support-state language, and route blockers before default promotion.
evaluator_independence: Independent review is required before this candidate can become a default route.
route_scope: canary field use for public manuscript context checks only
consumer_policy: Use as a canary route for drafting support only; do not make it the default route.
state_migration: No production state migration is authorized by this fixture.
rollback_plan: Retain impl://context-adequacy-v0 as fallback and rollback the canary route if predicates fail.
rollback_obligations: restore prior routing on failed predicates
default_route_blockers: runtime workload replay has not been run
non_claims: does not prove runtime route validity
